name: Inventory Technician Offboarding Sequence
description: Complete inventory management offboarding sequence for departing technicians

steps.title: Parts Inventory Reconciliation
steps.description: Reconcile all assigned parts and inventory items

substeps.title: Count all assigned parts inventory
substeps.description: Perform physical count of all parts assigned to technician

substeps.title: Validate parts usage logs
substeps.description: Review and validate all parts usage documentation and logs

substeps.title: Identify inventory discrepancies
substeps.description: Document any discrepancies between assigned and actual inventory

steps.title: Inventory Return Processing
steps.description: Process return of all inventory items

substeps.title: Schedule inventory pickup
substeps.description: Arrange for collection of all remaining inventory items

substeps.title: Update inventory management system
substeps.description: Update inventory system with returned items and final counts

substeps.title: Generate final inventory reconciliation report
substeps.description: Create comprehensive report of inventory status and any outstanding items
